# Source

- Upstream: https://github.com/hefgi/skills/tree/4169204d176fc10ab42a86658128a3f91d8602e3/shortcut
- APM dependency: `hefgi/skills/shortcut`
- Ref: `4169204d176fc10ab42a86658128a3f91d8602e3`
- License: MIT
- Notes: Wraps the `short` CLI (>= 5.0.0). Installed via mise as `npm:@shortcut-cli/shortcut-cli` in `home/dot_config/mise/conf.d/clis.toml`; the upstream SKILL.md lists `brew install shortcut-cli` but no such Homebrew formula exists (2026-05-14). Auth via `short install` or `SHORTCUT_API_TOKEN`.
